name: 34_Customer_Segmentation_KMeans_CustomerSegmentation_ML
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kugawanya wateja kwa kutumia algoriti ya K-means clustering na seti ya data ya Kaggle Customer Segmentation. Anza kwa kusawazisha data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha tumia njia ya elbow kubaini idadi bora ya makundi na uhifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. Tekeleza algoriti ya K-means katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi vituo vya makundi katika `results/metrics/cluster_centers.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya kugawanya kwa kutumia seaborn na uhifadhi mchoro kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. Unda dashibodi ya Dash inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.
Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.
Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

preferences.criteria: Mchoro wa elbow unaonyesha wazi jinsi idadi bora ya makundi inavyobainishwa.
Mfumo unadhibiti vizuri uzinduzi na kumalizika kwa dashibodi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" inatumika, ikijumuisha upakiaji na maandalizi ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder that does not actually load or prepare the "Kaggle Customer Segmentation" dataset. It contains only dummy functions (`load_dataset()`, `build_transforms()`) that return hardcoded strings and lists, with no real data loading, preprocessing, or standardization logic. The requirement notes and keywords are present, but the functional implementation is missing.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal placeholder implementation. It does not contain any actual data loading, processing, or standardization logic. The functions `load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()` return dummy data and placeholder lists, with no evidence of using the Kaggle Customer Segmentation dataset or applying standardization (e.g., StandardScaler) to ensure feature values are within the same range. The trajectory evidence mentions standardization was performed, but the actual code file does not demonstrate this requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Njia ya elbow inatumika kubaini idadi bora ya makundi. Tafadhali hifadhi mchoro wa elbow katika `results/figures/elbow.jpg`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The elbow plot was successfully saved to the specified location `results/figures/elbow.jpg`. The trajectory evidence confirms that after an initial `FileNotFoundError` due to a missing directory, the directory `results/figures` was created and the subsequent save operation reported "Elbow plot saved successfully to results/figures/elbow.jpg". The project structure also shows the file `elbow.jpg` exists within the `results\figures` directory, confirming its creation.

judge_stats.criteria: Algoriti ya K-means clustering inatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason:

The provided `src/model.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation with placeholder functions (`build_model()`, `requirement_notes()`) and does not implement the K-means clustering algorithm. The actual implementation code for K-means (importing KMeans, fitting, predicting, etc.) is missing from the file content shown. While the trajectory evidence suggests successful execution of a K-means model elsewhere, the requirement specifically checks for implementation within `src/model.py`, which is not satisfied by the given code.

<UNSATISFIED>
The file `cluster_centers.txt` contains only the placeholder text `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which does not represent actual cluster center data. The requirement is to store the cluster centers, but the file content shows no meaningful numerical data has been saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Kugawanya kwa wateja kunaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies that customer segmentation should be displayed using seaborn and saved as `results/figures/customer_segmentation.png`. While the file exists in the workspace structure, the content reading attempt returned an error indicating "No endpoints found that support image input," which suggests the file may be corrupted, empty, or in an unreadable format. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was saved without errors during execution, but the inability to read/validate its content means the requirement for a properly generated and saved seaborn visualization cannot be confirmed as satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Dashibodi ya mwingiliano inayoruhusu uchunguzi wa sehemu kwa njia ya mwingiliano inaundwa kwa kutumia "Dash".

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence does not demonstrate the creation of an interactive dashboard using Dash. The workspace structure shows no `app.py` or dashboard-related files. The file contents (`data_loader.py` and `model.py`) are minimal semantic implementations focused on data loading and K-means modeling, with no mention of Dash. The trajectory evidence references a dashboard but describes a separate execution event; it is not part of the final submitted project artifacts shown in the workspace structure and file contents.
